key_phrases: in 2 to 3 years, surely in 3 years, we will sort of see a point where we'll be either 0 debt or a nearly 0 debt company
our first priority will always be to pay down our debt
healthy reduction in borrowing and movement of ROCE towards 20% mark
highest ever quarterly sales, highest ever quarterly EBITDA and highest ever operating PAT
overall gross working capital continuing to stay stable and inventory turns improving to more than 4x
